name: Library Management
description: Complete library management — track books, authors, members, loans, categories, shelves, and reservations with full catalog and circulation oversight.
author: AENEWS

capabilities.name: searchBooks
capabilities.description: Search for books by title, author, ISBN, or category

capabilities.name: createLoan
capabilities.description: Create a new loan record for a member

capabilities.name: getMember
capabilities.description: Get member by ID with full profile and loan history

capabilities.name: updateBook
capabilities.description: Update book details, availability, and shelf location

capabilities.name: deleteLoan
capabilities.description: Remove a loan record from the system

capabilities.name: getAuthor
capabilities.description: Get author by ID with full bibliography

capabilities.name: searchMembers
capabilities.description: Search for members by name, email, or membership ID

permissions.name: Read
permissions.description: Read library data including books, authors, and members

permissions.name: Write
permissions.description: Create/Update books, authors, members, and loans

permissions.name: Delete
permissions.description: Delete books, loan records, and member accounts

permissions.name: Admin
permissions.description: Full library administration including settings and user management

events.description: New book added to the library catalog
New loan record created for a member
Book returned and loan marked as completed
